problem id: b3785949
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00001001 -> 00110111
  11001001 -> 00110011
  00011110 -> 00001111
  01001010 -> 10101101
  10011001 -> 10110011
  00000111 -> 01000111
  00000101 -> 01010111
  10010111 -> 11000011
  11010111 -> 11000011
  00101011 -> 00100110

query: 10010011
predicted answer: 11100011
